Wedding armorial achievements of: House of Steward of Rosyth. With Steward symbol. With shared noble Grimbergen black symbol and white moon crescent symbol. Blazon; three belt buckes sable, fesse chequey azure and
argent on two quarterlies or; three crescents argent on fesse sable, seme ermine sable all on two quarterlies argent.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland於1348年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾凱爾時，她的父親Laird Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer23歲，母親Margaret Fraser20歲。她於1370年與Sir Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1410年10月26日在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾道格拉斯享年62歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾德盧姆藍利 卡素。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland于1348年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾凱爾时，她的父亲Laird Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer23岁，母亲Margaret Fraser20岁。她于1370年与Sir Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1410年10月26日在英国苏格兰藍納可爾道格拉斯享年62岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰度福利爾德盧姆藍利 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

nameMeanings.name: Euphame
meanings: Scottish: A female name found in Scotland, the same as Euphame; or from sv well, and at,ivw, to appear.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland was born in 1348, in Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Laird Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer, was 23 and her mother, Margaret Fraser, was 20. She married Sir Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan in 1370, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 26 October 1410, in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Drumlanrig Castle, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland est née en 1348, à Kyle, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Laird Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaret Fraser, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan en 1370, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 octobre 1410, à Douglas, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Drumlanrig Castle, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1370 in Schottland, United Kingdom Sir Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland è nata il nel 1348 nel Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Laird Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Margaret Fraser, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan nel 1370, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 26 ottobre 1410, nel Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Drumlanrig Castle, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotlandが1348年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアクイルで生まれた時，父Laird Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeerは23歳，母Margaret Fraserは20歳であった。1370年にイギリススコットランドでSir Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1410年10月26日にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアドウグラスで62歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアドルムランリグ カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland(이)가 1348년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 키일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Laird Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Fraser(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1370년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Sir Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1410년 10월 26일 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 더글라스에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 드럼랜리그 카스틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland nasceu em 1348, em Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Laird Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Fraser, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan em 1370, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de outubro de 1410, em Douglas, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Drumlanrig Castle, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland родилась в 1348 г. в местности кил, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Laird Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Fraser, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan в 1370 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 26 октября 1410 г. в местности доуглас, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности друмланриг кастл, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland nació en 1348, en Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Laird Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margaret Fraser, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan en 1370, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 26 de octubre de 1410, en Douglas, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Drumlanrig Castle, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
